sub_outcomes.name: Data and Order Integrity
sub_outcomes.description: Ensuring accurate data flow from quote to production

kpis.description: Days from quote request to quote delivery

kpis.name: Clean Order Entry Rate
kpis.description: Percentage of orders entered correctly first time

kpis.name: BOM Release Lead Time
kpis.description: Days from order to BOM release

kpis.name: BOM Release Schedule Attainment
kpis.description: Percentage of BOMs released on schedule

kpis.name: Schedule Attainment
kpis.description: Did we build what we planned?

kpis.name: Design FPY

changes.old_value: Critical initiative to reduce quote-to-order cycle time from 14 days to 5 days. Current delays in pricing approvals and solution design handoffs are causing customer frustration and lost deals.

initiatives.name: Quote-to-Order Cycle Time Reduction
initiatives.description: Critical initiative to reduce quote-to-order cycle time from 14 days to 5 days. Current delays in pricing approvals and solution design handoffs are causing customer frustration and lost deals.

milestones.name: Process Bottleneck Analysis
milestones.description: Map current quote workflow and identify top 5 delay points

milestones.name: Pricing Matrix Simplification
milestones.description: Reduce pricing tiers from 47 to 12 standard configurations

milestones.name: Approval Workflow Automation
milestones.description: Implement auto-approval for quotes under $100K with standard configs

milestones.name: Sales Team Enablement
milestones.description: Train 200+ sales reps on new quoting process

risks.description: Finance team resistance to delegated approval authority - concerns about margin protection
risks.mitigation_plan: Executive alignment meeting scheduled; proposing margin guardrails in system

risks.description: Legacy CPQ system cannot support new workflow without major upgrade
risks.mitigation_plan: Evaluating interim manual workaround while planning system upgrade

financial.roi_hypothesis: Each day reduced in cycle time = $2.3M additional annual revenue capture

initiatives.name: Customer Request Intake Portal
initiatives.description: Unified digital portal for customer solution requests replacing email/phone intake. Will standardize requirements capture and auto-route to appropriate solution design teams.

milestones.name: Requirements Documentation
milestones.description: Document intake requirements across all product lines

milestones.name: Portal UX Design
milestones.description: Complete customer-facing portal design and testing

milestones.name: Integration Development
milestones.description: Connect portal to CRM and solution design workflow

milestones.name: Customer Pilot Launch
milestones.description: Launch with 20 strategic accounts for feedback

risks.description: Customer adoption may be slow - some prefer existing relationship-based intake
risks.mitigation_plan: Designing hybrid model that preserves rep relationships while adding digital option

financial.roi_hypothesis: 40% reduction in request-to-acknowledgment time; improved requirements accuracy

initiatives.name: Solution Design Handoff Standardization
initiatives.description: Critical fix for breakdowns between Sales and Engineering during solution design. 34% of deals require re-work due to incomplete or misunderstood requirements at handoff.

milestones.name: Failure Mode Analysis
milestones.description: Analyze 100 recent re-work cases to identify root causes

milestones.name: Handoff Checklist Development
milestones.description: Create standardized requirements checklist for each product family

milestones.name: Sales-Engineering Alignment Sessions
milestones.description: Conduct joint training sessions in all regions

milestones.name: Process Compliance Tracking
milestones.description: Implement tracking dashboard for handoff quality metrics

risks.description: Sales leadership not prioritizing training attendance - quota pressures
risks.mitigation_plan: Escalating to CRO for mandate; proposing quota relief during training

risks.description: Regional variations in solution complexity making single checklist insufficient
risks.mitigation_plan: Creating region-specific addendums to core checklist

financial.roi_hypothesis: Eliminating re-work saves $4.2M annually in engineering hours and accelerates delivery by 8 days

initiatives.name: Commercial Pricing Engine Upgrade
initiatives.description: Replace legacy pricing spreadsheets with automated pricing engine that enforces margin floors, applies volume discounts, and generates audit-ready documentation.

milestones.name: Pricing Logic Documentation
milestones.description: Document all pricing rules, exceptions, and approval thresholds

milestones.name: Vendor Selection
milestones.description: Select and contract with pricing software vendor

milestones.name: System Configuration
milestones.description: Configure pricing rules and integrate with CRM/ERP

milestones.name: Parallel Run & Validation
milestones.description: Run parallel with legacy system for 60 days

risks.description: Complex regional pricing variations may require extensive customization
risks.mitigation_plan: Phasing rollout by region; starting with North America

financial.roi_hypothesis: 2% margin improvement from consistent pricing discipline = $8M annual impact

initiatives.name: Order Capture Error Reduction
initiatives.description: Address 12% order entry error rate causing fulfillment delays and customer complaints. Implementing validation rules, guided entry, and real-time inventory checks.

milestones.name: Error Pattern Analysis
milestones.description: Categorize errors by type, frequency, and root cause

milestones.name: Validation Rule Design
milestones.description: Design field-level validation rules for top 10 error types

milestones.name: System Implementation
milestones.description: Deploy validation rules to order entry system

milestones.name: Training & Go-Live
milestones.description: Train order entry team and monitor error rates

risks.description: Validation rules may slow order entry, impacting throughput
risks.mitigation_plan: Implementing smart defaults and auto-fill to offset validation time

financial.roi_hypothesis: Reducing errors from 12% to 3% saves $1.8M in re-work and expedite costs

initiatives.name: Real-Time Inventory Visibility for Sales
initiatives.description: Provide sales team with real-time ATP (Available-to-Promise) data during quoting to eliminate over-commits and improve delivery date accuracy.

milestones.name: Data Source Mapping
milestones.description: Identify all inventory data sources and refresh frequencies

milestones.name: API Development
milestones.description: Build real-time inventory API for CPQ integration

milestones.name: CPQ Integration
milestones.description: Integrate ATP data into quoting workflow

milestones.name: Sales Enablement
milestones.description: Train sales on using ATP data in customer conversations

risks.description: Legacy ERP refresh latency causing stale inventory data in CPQ
risks.mitigation_plan: Implementing change data capture for near-real-time sync

risks.description: Multiple warehouse systems with inconsistent data formats
risks.mitigation_plan: Building normalization layer in integration middleware

financial.roi_hypothesis: Accurate ATP reduces expedite costs by $2.1M and improves customer satisfaction scores

initiatives.name: Order Fulfillment Status Dashboard
initiatives.description: Customer-facing and internal dashboard providing real-time order status from capture through delivery. Reduces status inquiry calls by enabling self-service tracking.

milestones.name: Status Milestone Definition
milestones.description: Define standard order milestones across all product lines

milestones.name: Internal Dashboard MVP
milestones.description: Launch internal dashboard for customer service team

milestones.name: Customer Portal Development
milestones.description: Build customer-facing order tracking portal

milestones.name: Customer Launch
milestones.description: Roll out portal to all customers with training

risks.description: Third-party logistics providers may not support real-time data feeds
risks.mitigation_plan: Negotiating API access requirements in carrier contracts

financial.roi_hypothesis: 30% reduction in status inquiry calls saves $1.2M in support costs; improved NPS

initiatives.name: Post-Delivery Customer Feedback Loop
initiatives.description: Systematic capture of customer feedback at delivery completion to identify process improvements and drive continuous improvement in the sales-to-fulfillment journey.

milestones.name: Survey Design
milestones.description: Design NPS and process satisfaction survey

milestones.name: Automation Setup
milestones.description: Configure automated survey triggers post-delivery

milestones.name: Feedback Dashboard
milestones.description: Build executive dashboard for feedback insights

milestones.name: Closed-Loop Process
milestones.description: Implement process for acting on negative feedback

risks.description: Low customer response rates may limit data value
risks.mitigation_plan: Designing brief survey with incentive program for completion

financial.roi_hypothesis: Data-driven process improvements projected to increase repeat purchase rate by 5%

enterprise_metrics.name: Order Entry Error Rate
enterprise_metrics.description: Percentage of orders requiring correction after submission

enterprise_metrics.name: On-Time Delivery Rate
enterprise_metrics.description: Percentage of orders delivered by promised date

strategic_initiatives.description: Engineer To Order transformation - reducing cycle times and improving configuration accuracy

milestones.name: Discovery Complete
milestones.description: Complete discovery phase with stakeholder interviews

milestones.name: Solution Design Approval
milestones.description: Get executive approval on solution design

milestones.name: Pilot Launch
milestones.description: Launch pilot program with select plants

activities.name: Solution Design Review
activities.description: Review solution design with technical leads

milestones.name: Quality Assessment
milestones.description: Complete quality baseline assessment

milestones.name: Root Cause Analysis
milestones.description: Identify root causes of quality issues

strategic_initiatives.name: Planning
strategic_initiatives.description: Planning stability and forecast accuracy improvement

business_outcome_categories.name: ETO
business_outcome_categories.description: Engineer To Order - Custom product engineering and configuration

projects.name: BOM Grid Enhancement
projects.description: Improve BOM configuration grid for faster and more accurate product specification

projects.name: Plant Team Standardization
projects.description: Standardize engineering processes across plant teams

projects.description: End-to-end visibility platform for ETO process
